first_run.rationale: The score is identical, and the core assessment of the candidate's strengths (full-stack, infrastructure) and weaknesses (explicit GenAI/RAG experience) is consistent across both evaluations. The differences in wording and the slightly more positive framing of potential in the variant fall within the expected range of run-to-run variation for a language model. The substantive points of the evaluation have not changed.
